final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: product-mockup
Asset type: editorial product shot, luxury magazine ad or e-commerce hero image
Primary request: minimalist product photography of a high-end perfume bottle with architectural geometric aesthetics
Scene/backdrop: pure white marble pedestal, gradient off-white background with ample negative space
Subject: luxury perfume bottle with irregular polyhedral cut design, ultra-transparent glass material, pale amber liquid inside, matte black metal cap with embossed brand logo relief pattern
Style/medium: minimalist product photography, clean and restrained, luxury editorial aesthetic
Composition/framing: centered composition, generous negative space, square crop
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light from upper left, creating delicate refractive spectrum on the glass surface, high-key elegant atmosphere
Color palette: cool neutral tones, pure white marble, pale amber liquid, matte black accents, off-white gradient background
Materials/textures: ultra-transparent glass with refractive properties, matte black metal with embossed relief, smooth white marble surface
Constraints: keep the bottle as the sole focal point, maintain clean and minimal aesthetic, preserve the geometric polyhedral cut design
Avoid: cluttered background, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, busy props, plastic-looking materials
